title: Monday CRM - Templates
excerpt:
Hey, has anyone good source of CRM templates with buttons or links? 
Wondering what’s your favorite way to HTML design? or have a good Sequence pattern?

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: Matt_Frost (Dr Matt Frost - www.frostgroup.uk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Have you had a look at monday spaces?

There are a lot of templates and builds uploaded here by power-users, ambassadors, and partners (like me )

Is there something specific you are looking for?

mondayspaces.com

monday spaces - create, share, and modify workspaces

Discover new workspaces and level-up your workflow with monday. Spaces Hub offers proven templates, example Spaces, and inspiration from a diverse collection of creators and verticals to help you streamline your workforce management. Whether you're...

posts.author: bianchi (Verena Bianchi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Looks like there’s no built-in “auto-unsubscribe” in monday.com yet, but you can still set something up. A neat workaround is to embed an unsubscribe form in your emails so recipients can opt out, and then use that updates their status in your board. Others have gone even deeper—build an API endpoint so clicking “unsubscribe” flags that contact and prevents them from getting emails again. It’s a custom fix, but it works.

hopefully, monday.com adds a native opt-out feature soon—until then, these workarounds can save a lot of manual clean-up.
